rawIntent: Add a kebab-case utility under src/shared/utils/kebab-case with kebabCase(s: string): string

successCriteria.description: A utility function kebabCase(s: string): string exists under src/shared/utils/kebab-case and correctly converts strings to kebab-case.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
Input validated at the API boundary
outOfScope: Integration of the utility function into other parts of the application
UI changes to utilize the new utility function
